# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> A private marine office providing the full range of services a great yacht requires: management, brokerage, refit, charter, crew, detailing, engineering counsel, and berthing logistics. Growing by introduction and reputation.

## Practices

- [Yacht Management](https://acmarine.com/services/yacht-management): Flag, finance, compliance, payroll, insurance, crew.
- [Brokerage & Acquisition](https://acmarine.com/services/brokerage): Off-market vessels, sea trials, surveys, considered purchases.
- [Refit & Project Oversight](https://acmarine.com/services/refit): Owner's representative shipyard-side.
- [Crew Placement](https://acmarine.com/services/crew): Vetted captains, engineers, chefs, stewards, deckhands.
- [Detailing & Daily Stewardship](https://acmarine.com/services/detailing): Varnish, paint, leather, teak, polish, deep wash by hand.
- [Charter Programmes](https://acmarine.com/services/charter): Itineraries shaped to the principal.
- [Engineering & Technical Counsel](https://acmarine.com/services/engineering): Re-power studies, propulsion modelling, electronics, classification.
- [Berths, Transits & Concierge](https://acmarine.com/services/concierge): Moorings, customs, transits, provisioning.

## Locations

- [Monaco](https://acmarine.com/locations/monaco)
- [Antibes](https://acmarine.com/locations/antibes)
- [Newport](https://acmarine.com/locations/newport)
- [Seattle](https://acmarine.com/locations/seattle)

## Fleet

- [The Fleet](https://acmarine.com/fleet): vessels currently presented for sale, charter, and management.

## Articles

- [Articles](https://acmarine.com/articles): notes from the office on yacht industry, refit, brokerage, crew, charter.
